description: Document vision for kapi — OCR (and, in later phases, ML layout and table structure) over page images via RapidOCR / PP-OCRv4 ONNX models, run in-process and driven over a binary-framed stdin/stdout protocol.
author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

commands.name: vision
commands.long: Construct the in-process vision engine and list the model assets. The host `vision` engine drives the plugin over the binary-framed stdin/stdout protocol (kapi-vision serve); this command is for interactive verification.
